app.name: Interactive AI Portfolio
app.one_liner: A production-grade interactive portfolio featuring a dual-mode AI chatbot with agentic RAG, 6-layer security, automated evals, and LLMOps observability.

screens.name: LLMOps Dashboard
screens.purpose: Provide observability into AI system performance, security, costs, and evaluation results.
primary_actions: Inspect security alerts and jailbreak attempts

screens.name: Portfolio Home + Chat Interface
screens.purpose: Showcase interactive CV and enable conversation with AI avatar in text or voice mode.
primary_actions: Enable voice mode via OpenAI Realtime API

rust_commands.name: generate_regression_test
rust_commands.purpose: Auto-generate a new evaluation test from a production trace when online quality score falls below threshold.

rust_commands.name: trigger_jailbreak_alert
rust_commands.purpose: Send real-time email alert when prompt injection or jailbreak is detected by any of the 6 defense layers.

mvp_plan: week 1: Create minimal /ops dashboard with conversation log
week 1: Implement core text chat with Claude Sonnet and basic RAG
week 1: Set up Supabase + pgvector for hybrid search
week 2: Write 5 core evals for factual accuracy and persona
week 3: Add canary tokens and fingerprinting defenses
week 3: Build CI gate that runs evals on push
week 3: Implement voice mode via OpenAI Realtime API
week 4: Populate all 8 LLMOps dashboard tabs
acceptance_tests: Chatbot responds in first person as Santiago using agentic RAG grounded in real experience.
LLMOps dashboard displays live data across all 8 tabs (Overview, Conversations, Costs, RAG, Security, Evals, Voice, System).
Real-time jailbreak attempt triggers email alert within 10 seconds.
System blocks deployment if any of the 71 automated evals fail during CI.
Voice mode shares same RAG pipeline as text mode and maintains persona consistency.
